title: Lala Kadai Shanthi Lyrics Saravanan Irukka Bayamaen
stanzas:
<div>
<div>
Lala Kadai Shanthi Lyrics Saravanan Irukka Bayamaen

vedha vedhamaa
inichirukkum
vedala ponnu naanum.

viruppa pattu nerungi vandhaa
velakkanaikkum maanu
vaamaanu nee sonnaa
tharuvaene thaenu.
vattiyoda asala vaangu
athuthaane scene

Lala kada shanthi
unnaal aanene naan boondhi(2)

paathaa palapalakkura
paalaa valiya vaikkura
keeththaa kizhiya vaikkura
kirukkethi..

kaettaa kadhai alakkura
kaeppaa enna vedikkura
theettaa odhungi nikkura
usuppethi..

Lala kada shanthi
unna povene naan yaendhi(2)

yaenda eli pudikkira
eeyaa elai virikkura
thoondi thiruva nikkura
shiruthi yaeththi.

vaandaa suzhalavaikkura
vaagaa vali maraikkura
thaandi thavaru pannura
adi aaththi.

Lala kada shanthi
unnaal aanene naan boondhi
Lala kada shanthi
unna povene naan yaendhi

aasa veragaduppula
vaega velanji nikkurar
rosa unna ninaikkayil
nedi yaerum.

paasi payiru kannula
badam paruppu seyyura
rasa unna nerunjayil
rusi maarum.

maththaaga manasa
nee kadaiyaama
enna maaraapil
patham paaru.

saththaaga sagalamum
tharaporen.
moththa saapaattu
pasi aaru.

usure kaekka
una naan thookka
vaaren maaman
kooththadikka.

Lala kada shanthi
unna povene naan yaendhi
Lala kada shanthi
unnaal aanene naan boondhi

paalum kodhichirukkuthu
paayum virichirukkudhu
aanaa adhu edhukkunu
theriyaathaa

kaayum kanichirukkuthu
vaayum nenajirukkuthu
aanaa adhu unakkunu
puriyaathaa

un kannaadi valaviyum
odaiyaama
unna kattoda
madippene.

en kandaangi pudavaiyum
kasangaama
kuda mallaanthu
kedappene.

udane vaadi
olungaa thaadi
moodi pola
ennaathadi.

Lala kada shanthi
unna povene naan yaendhi
Lala kada shanthi
unnaal aanene naan boondhi

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Lala Kadai Shanthi?

The song is a peppy and energetic track that celebrates joy and fun, making it ideal for parties and celebrations.

Who are the singers of Lala Kadai Shanthi?

The song is sung by D Imman and Sunidhi Chauhan.

Who composed the music for Saravanan Irukka Bayamaen?

The music for the movie was composed by D Imman.

When was Lala Kadai Shanthi released?

The song was released on March 31, 2017.
enrichedMetadata.summary: Lala Kadai Shanthi is a lively and upbeat song from the movie Saravanan Irukka Bayamaen, capturing the essence of fun and celebration. Sung by D Imman and Sunidhi Chauhan, the track is filled with energetic beats and catchy lyrics. It portrays a joyful atmosphere, making it perfect for party scenes in the film. The song's vibrant energy and playful tone convey a sense of happiness and excitement, inviting listeners to join in the revelry.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Lala Kadai Shanthi from the movie Saravanan Irukka Bayamaen is a vibrant and energetic track that brings together the dynamic vocals of D Imman and Sunidhi Chauhan. The song's lively beats and catchy lyrics make it a perfect anthem for celebrations and parties. Experience the unique blend of D Imman's musical brilliance and Sunidhi's powerful voice in this unforgettable number.
stanzaMeanings: I'm a girl who is sweet like sugar.
If you come closer with love, I'll give you honey. I'll take the interest and principal, that's the scene.
Lala shop peace, because of you I became a sweet.
When you see, it makes you crazy, it makes you scream.
When you ask, it tells stories, it makes you angry.
Lala shop peace, I'll leave because of you.
Why catch a mouse, when you can spread a leaf and relax?
When you come, it makes you dizzy, it hides the path.
Lala shop peace, because of you I became a sweet. Lala shop peace, I'll leave because of you.
In the roots of desire, I stand fast. When I think of you, I climb high.
When I touch you, the taste changes.
Don't change your mind, look at the path.
I'll give you everything loudly. The hunger for food will end.
To make you listen, I'll come and dance with you.
Lala shop peace, I'll leave because of you. Lala shop peace, because of you I became a sweet.
The milk is boiling, the cloth is spread, but you don't know why.
The fruit is ripe, the mouth is full, but you don't understand it's for you.
I'll tie you up without breaking your mirror.
I'll lie down without dirtying my saree.
Come quickly, don't delay, don't be lazy.
Lala shop peace, I'll leave because of you. Lala shop peace, because of you I became a sweet.
